ai_announcements.headline: SpaceX may spend up to $119B on 'Terafab' chip factory in Texas
ai_announcements.summary: SpaceX proposing massive vertically integrated semiconductor fab in Texas

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Axcelis makes ion implantation equipment; a new mega-fab would be a customer, not a competitor. But $119B SpaceX fab is years away and Axcelis exposure is mostly mature/power chips, not leading edge AI logic. Move size (+22%) is far larger than this news justifies — likely earnings or M&A driven, not Terafab.
research_pointers: Check ACLS earnings release date — 22% on 2.5x volume suggests an earnings beat or guide raise, not the SpaceX news
Verify if any analyst upgrade tied move to fab capex cycle
If move is purely earnings, Terafab linkage is noise

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: IPG fiber lasers used in semi/industrial; fab buildouts could be a tailwind but indirect. Move likely company-specific (earnings).
research_pointers: Check IPGP earnings — 5-day was -10% then +12% today suggests reversal on results
Sympathy from semi-cap strength insufficient to explain

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Kyndryl is IT services/managed infra; SAP locking down approved agents could marginally pressure SI partners but Kyndryl's -10% on 2.76x volume is almost certainly earnings-driven, not SAP news. AI services narrative may be a secondary overhang on IT services names broadly.
research_pointers: Confirm KD earnings timing — likely the primary driver
Check if guidance cited AI competition/pricing pressure on managed services
Falsifier: if KD reaffirmed/beat guide, the AI services-displacement read is wrong

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Most large moves in the tape (PRIM -50%, TMDX -23%, GEO +21%, TGTX +16%, CC -15%, ANDE -14%, CRK -14%, CRC -12%, CLH -8%, FRPT -9%, CE -10%, ELAN +14%, LIVN +15%, KMT +15%, LTH +14%, KAI +13%, MRCY +10%) appear to be earnings/company-specific events with no plausible linkage to today's AI announcements. Quiet night for AI-driven mispricings; the AI news flow today is incremental (Apple settlement, Match capex, SAP M&A, SpaceX fab proposal) with no clear sympathy-selling or under-rallying targets among the moving names.
